name: 10874-mcp-log-rotation
_purpose: Evidence for warpdotdev/warp#10874. noisy-mcp is configured with NOISY_MCP_AUTO_SPAM_MIB=35 / RATE=1.5 MiB/sec, so when warp-oss launches it writes ~35 MiB of stderr at a controlled rate. Warp's MCP capture rotates the per-server log file once each 10 MiB slot fills — ~3 rotations visible inside ~24s. The recipe drives one shell watch loop that prints `ls -lh <mcp-dir>` repeatedly so the rotation files become visible appearing/rolling within the recording. Zero agent credits consumed.
_safety: All input arrives via paste_text (NSPasteboard → Cmd+V). git output is force-paged off via --no-pager / rev-parse — no pager surfaces possible.
_credit_budget: Zero agent / tool calls. The MCP server self-drives via env var.

steps.text: cd ~/personal/warp && git branch --show-current && git rev-parse --short HEAD && for i in $(seq 1 28); do printf '\n=== t=%ds ===\n' $((i*1)); ls -lh "$HOME/Library/Group Containers/2BBY89MBSN.dev.warp/Library/Application Support/dev.warp.WarpOss/mcp/"; sleep 1; done
